title: Emoji like shader
description: A sequel to the **Ascii like shader**, unlike the first one, this one replaces everything with emojis.
body:
A sequel to the **Ascii like shader**, unlike the first one, this one replaces everything with emojis.

⚠Warning your eyes may hurt 

## Features:
  
Converts the Minecraft world into a grid of emojis, replacing traditional view with genZ emojis like 🤡🙄😳💀  
  
  
## ASCII version:
[https://modrinth.com/shader/ascii-like-shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/ascii-like-shader)
